'''Shirlee Faughn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who served to [[Samuel Tomas Gillespee]]'s organization and later in [[Talon Karrde]]'s.

==Biography==
She joined Gillespee as a teenager and worked as a communications specialist. She worked her way up to eventually become his second-in-command.<ref name="TLCSB" /> When [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] captured [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]], she and [[Rappapor]] helped their boss escape.<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>

When Gillespee merged his organization into [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smugglers' Alliance]], Faughn transferred to him and became the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Starry Ice]]'', under command of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. She piloted the ''Starry Ice'' when the former [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mission to the Kauron asteroid field|rescued]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in the [[Kauron asteroid field]] and later conducted her to [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. When Mara disappeared on this planet, Faughn was forced to abandon her to report to Talon Karrde.<ref name="SotP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>
